claim_bullets.bullet_text: The recipes are written for practicality, and their implementation may introduce JavaScript features not yet discussed in the text, such as methods and/or prototypes. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)
The overall use of each recipe will fit within the spirit of the language discussed so far, even if the implementations may not. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)

source_record_text: The recipes are written for practicality, and their implementation may introduce JavaScript features that haven't been discussed in the text to this point, such as methods and/or prototypes. The overall use of each recipe will fit within the spirit of the language discussed so far, even if the implementations may not.
